title: manulea viscosa
intro: Manulea viscosa, also known as sticky manulea, is a plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs, and provide relief from fever. Manulea viscosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
